models.name: PrepperGPT Auto
models.tpsEstimate: 25-90 completion tokens/sec when the fast lane is warm

source.description: Virtual OpenAI-compatible route exposed by the local-agent sidecar.

models.name: GLM 5.2 Q8 Local
models.tpsEstimate: very low tokens/sec may be acceptable in disaster/off-grid use because no hosted model is available; benchmark locally

source.description: Run a GLM 5.2 Q8 OpenAI-compatible llama.cpp server at http://127.0.0.1:11446/v1 with weights on fast NVMe for maximum local quality when hosted services are unavailable.

models.name: GLM 5.2 Q4 Local
models.tpsEstimate: 0.4-3 completion tokens/sec on large CPU/NVMe builds; acceptable for disaster/off-grid use when no hosted service is available; benchmark locally

source.description: Run a GLM 5.2 Q4 OpenAI-compatible llama.cpp server at http://127.0.0.1:11441/v1 with weights on NVMe.

models.name: Slopcode Qwen Coding 64k
models.tpsEstimate: 2-12 completion tokens/sec depending on quantization and offload

source.description: Run an OpenAI-compatible Slopcode/Qwen endpoint at http://127.0.0.1:11438/v1.

models.name: Gemma Fast Local
models.tpsEstimate: 35-90 completion tokens/sec on a modern 16-24 GB NVIDIA GPU or supported Linux AMD ROCm GPU

source.description: Pulled or provided through the local Ollama server. AMD hosts use the Ollama ROCm container when ROCm is detected on Linux.

models.name: Qwen Coder Fast Fallback
models.tpsEstimate: 12-45 completion tokens/sec depending on GPU vendor, ROCm/CUDA readiness, and quantization

source.description: Ollama coding fallback. AMD hosts use the Ollama ROCm container when ROCm is detected on Linux.

models.name: Small CPU/GPU Fallback
models.tpsEstimate: 15-80 completion tokens/sec depending on GPU; usable CPU fallback

source.description: Small Ollama fallback for broad hardware reach.

models.name: Deep Research
models.tpsEstimate: research latency depends on search/fetch count and synthesis model

source.description: Sidecar route that uses search, Tika, local documents, and the selected reasoning model.

models.name: Local Agent
models.tpsEstimate: tool latency depends on browser, shell, search, and selected synthesis model

source.description: Approval-gated local tool, browser, desktop, and auto-router sidecar.

models.name: Local Vision Gemma
models.tpsEstimate: image latency depends on Ollama vision route and image size

source.description: Local vision sidecar proxying the Gemma Ollama vision route.

models.name: Local Vision Moondream2
models.tpsEstimate: usually fast after model load; CPU fallback is acceptable for OCR-style tasks

source.description: Downloaded by Transformers on first use.

models.name: Flux Image Generation
models.tpsEstimate: image generation, not token generation; expect tens of seconds per image

source.description: Place Flux model, text encoder, and VAE files in the configured ComfyUI models directory. Use a CUDA or Linux ROCm ComfyUI runtime that matches the host GPU.

models.name: Bundled Whisper Base STT
models.tpsEstimate: local speech-to-text speed depends on CPU/GPU and clip length

source.description: Installer-cached faster-whisper base model mounted into OpenWebUI for offline local STT after install.
